article.title: Comparative effects of weight-loss diet, exercise training, respiratory muscle training, and oropharyngeal muscle training in obstructive sleep apnea: a systematic review and network meta-analysis.
article.authors: Lin X, Liu D, Sun W
article.abstract: Obstructive sleep apnea (OSA) is a common sleep disorder and has become a significant public health issue. Weight-loss diet (WLD), exercise training (ET), respiratory muscle training (RMT), and oropharyngeal muscle training (OMT) have been shown to improve OSA symptoms to some extent, offering new treatment options.
